content.query:
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'akshay@5114747#$'
GO

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL akshaycreds
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'
GO
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source
WITH (
    LOCATION   = 'abfss://silver@netflixproject28.dfs.core.windows.net/',
    CREDENTIAL = akshaycreds
)
GO

-- WRITE source (gold container)
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE gold_source
WITH (
    LOCATION   = 'abfss://gold@netflixproject28.dfs.core.windows.net/',
    CREDENTIAL = akshaycreds
)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT ParquetFormat
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
)
GO
CREATE SCHEMA netflix_schema

-- 1. cast
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.gold_netflixcast
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflixcast/',   
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK        '/netflix_cast/',         
    DATA_SOURCE = 'silver_source',
    FORMAT      = 'DELTA'
) AS df
GO

-- 2. titles
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.gold_netflixtitles
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflixtitles/',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK        '/netflix_titles/',   
    DATA_SOURCE = 'silver_source',
    FORMAT      = 'DELTA'
) AS df
GO

-- 3. directors
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.gold_netflixdirectors
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflixdirectors/', 
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK        '/netflix_directors/',     
    DATA_SOURCE = 'silver_source',
    FORMAT      = 'DELTA'
) AS df
GO

-- 4. countries
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.gold_netflixcountries
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflixcountries/', 
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK        '/netflix_countries/',      
    DATA_SOURCE = 'silver_source',
    FORMAT      = 'DELTA'
) AS df
-- GO

-- 5. category
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.gold_netflixcategory
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflixcategory/', 
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK        '/netflix_category/',       
    DATA_SOURCE = 'silver_source',
    FORMAT      = 'DELTA'
) AS df
GO

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS netflix_schema.vw_netflix_complete
GO

CREATE VIEW netflix_schema.vw_netflix_complete
AS
SELECT
    t.show_id,
    t.title,
    t.type,
    t.release_year,
    t.rating,
    t.duration_minutes,
    d.director,
    c.cast,
    ct.country,
    cat.listed_in
FROM      netflix_schema.gold_netflixtitles    t
LEFT JOIN netflix_schema.gold_netflixdirectors d   
    ON CAST(t.show_id AS VARCHAR) = CAST(d.show_id AS VARCHAR)  
LEFT JOIN netflix_schema.gold_netflixcast      c   
    ON CAST(t.show_id AS VARCHAR) = CAST(c.show_id AS VARCHAR)  
LEFT JOIN netflix_schema.gold_netflixcountries ct  
    ON CAST(t.show_id AS VARCHAR) = CAST(ct.show_id AS VARCHAR) 
LEFT JOIN netflix_schema.gold_netflixcategory  cat 
    ON CAST(t.show_id AS VARCHAR) = CAST(cat.show_id AS VARCHAR)
GO

SELECT*FROM netflix_schema.vw_netflix_complete

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE netflix_schema.netflix_final
WITH (
    LOCATION    = '/gold_netflix_final/', 
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
)
AS
SELECT * FROM netflix_schema.vw_netflix_complete;

SELECT*FROM netflix_schema.vw_netflix_complete;
